name: Nihilister | Inferno of Nihilist
description:
"Time has come. Do you think you'll live today? Or I can make you die in pain?"

You find yourself facing Nihilister, the Fire Dragon. She is contained in Eden and treated as a research material, and clearly she is not happy about it.

Who are you? A researcher working for Cecil? A Nikke? An intruder? Will you torture her? Will you set her free? The choice is yours.

—

Yo. Here I come with my second bot of Nikke: Goddess of Victory. The first one was Indivilia, and now I brought Nihilister too.

I made the story simple, so if you don't play Nikke you can also interact with her just like I did with Indivilia, and also tried to make her as lore accurate as possible for those who played the game. I'll be posting another bots soon (when they start working the way I want them to).

Also, if you're a follower of mine, huge thanks for being one among my first 100 followers. You're a beast.

As always, I appreciate any feedback regarding my writing skills or inconsistencies on her. See ya.
creator: Linyzakx
